scenes.concept: Julien walks through a bustling market street as a sudden rain shower leaves a rainbow in its wake.
scenes.location: Busy market street in a creative city
scenes.action: Walking with a laptop in hand, smiling as he talks to a colleague on the phone.
scenes.visual_detail: A vibrant rainbow arching over the street.

scenes.concept: In a sunlit loft, Julien gazes out of a large window, lost in thought as he holds his laptop.
scenes.action: Standing still, contemplating the cityscape outside.
scenes.visual_detail: Golden sunlight streaming through the window, casting long shadows.

scenes.concept: Julien in a bustling open workspace, animatedly discussing a project with a diverse group.
scenes.location: Open workspace in a creative hub
scenes.action: Engaging in an active discussion, gesturing with his hands.
scenes.visual_detail: A vibrant mural on the wall behind him.

scenes.concept: Julien pauses on a rooftop garden, overlooking the city as lights begin to twinkle.
scenes.action: Standing still, taking a deep breath, appreciating the view.
scenes.visual_detail: Soft glow of city lights contrasting with the darkening sky.
